Meta Platforms (META) has moved from the low-$500 range in early 2024 to trade in the high-$600s by 11 February 2026, after reaching levels above $750 during 2025.

# 1 Prediction for Meta Platforms in 2026

Shares of the powerful social media enterprise have been on a winning streak.

## Key Points

Meta Platforms (META +2.48%) beat Wall Street estimates when it recently reported revenue of $59.9 billion and diluted earnings per share of $8.88 for Q4 2025 (ended Dec. 31). Shares of the social media and digital ad leader are up 9% this year (as of Jan. 29). And they have climbed 372% in the past 36 months.
